| `['after_hours_flow_summary']` | `Calls are taken by Clara and routed appropriately based on urgency and business rules.` | `After hours, Clara answers and lets the caller know that Ben's Electric Solutions is currently closed. The message is sent to Ben and Dave immediately.` | Updated during onboarding |
| `['office_hours_flow_summary']` | `Calls are handled by Clara, with specific calls routed directly to Ben or other team members as configured.` | `During business hours, Clara answers every call and gathers customer information including name, phone number, address, and description of the issue. She lets the customer know that the team will get back to them shortly to schedule it. For customers who specifically ask to speak to Ben or Dave, Clara attempts to transfer the call to their respective phone numbers. For calls from Cascade Property Management, Skyline Builders, or Redwood Construction, Clara attempts a live transfer to Ben or Dave during business hours.` | Updated during onboarding |
